orders_finalization_email_pending_idx.name: orders_finalization_email_pending_idx
orders_finalization_email_pending_idx.where: "orders"."finalization_email_kind" is not null and "orders"."finalization_email_sent_at" is null

order_item_charges_signed_amounts_check.name: order_item_charges_signed_amounts_check
order_item_charges_signed_amounts_check.value:
(
				"order_item_charges"."kind" = 'discount'
				and "order_item_charges"."gross_minor" <= 0
				and "order_item_charges"."net_minor" <= 0
				and "order_item_charges"."unit_net_minor" <= 0
			) or (
				"order_item_charges"."kind" <> 'discount'
				and "order_item_charges"."gross_minor" >= 0
				and "order_item_charges"."net_minor" >= 0
				and "order_item_charges"."unit_net_minor" >= 0
			)

provider_bookings_provider_reservation_u.name: provider_bookings_provider_reservation_uidx
provider_bookings_provider_reservation_u.where: "provider_bookings"."provider_reservation_id" is not null and "provider_bookings"."external_account_id" is not null

provider_bookings_provider_reservation_n.name: provider_bookings_provider_reservation_null_account_uidx
provider_bookings_provider_reservation_n.where: "provider_bookings"."provider_reservation_id" is not null and "provider_bookings"."external_account_id" is null

provider_bookings_provider_transaction_u.name: provider_bookings_provider_transaction_uidx
provider_bookings_provider_transaction_u.where: "provider_bookings"."provider_transaction_id" is not null and "provider_bookings"."external_account_id" is not null

provider_bookings_provider_transaction_n.name: provider_bookings_provider_transaction_null_account_uidx
provider_bookings_provider_transaction_n.where: "provider_bookings"."provider_transaction_id" is not null and "provider_bookings"."external_account_id" is null
